title: Die Heilige und ihr Narr
writer: Agnes Günther, Curt J. Braun, Charlotte Hagenbruch
actors: William Dieterle, Lien Deyers, Gina Manès
plot: A painter (played by Dieterie) falls in love with the daughter (Deyers) of a neighboring count, causing the girl's stepmother to fly into a jealous rage.
